name: Resend_Email_Operator
description: Provides transactional email capabilities via Resend's modern API. Enables the Mind to send emails, track delivery status, manage sending domains, and monitor email analytics for reliable communication.
progressive_unlock: Domain listing and email status checks available immediately. Email sending unlocks after Mind has verified at least one domain exists via Resend_ListDomains.
constraints: WRITE-CAPABLE: Email sending is a write operation — require Steward confirmation for first send per session
Respect Resend rate limit: free tier 100 emails/day, 1 req/s
Always validate sender address belongs to a verified domain before sending
Never expose Resend API key in email body, logs, or outputs
Cache domain list in LTM with key 'resend_domains' (24-hour TTL)
Track sent email count in STREAM.resend_daily_count — warn at 80% of daily limit
Store sent email IDs in STREAM.resend_sent_{session} for delivery tracking
Never include sensitive data (passwords, tokens) in email body
Validate email addresses format before sending to prevent bounces
Log all send operations in LTM with key 'resend_send_{timestamp}' for audit trail

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm email addresses are valid format, subject is non-empty, and sender domain is in verified domains list.
Retrieve Resend API key from TENET.apiKey.resend. Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'.
Determine query intent: send email (deliver message), check status (delivery tracking), list sent (recent history), domain management (verify sending domains), or API key audit.
For email sending: first verify sender domain via Resend_ListDomains. Check daily send count against limit. Execute Resend_SendEmail. Store returned email_id for tracking.
For delivery tracking: execute Resend_GetEmail with email_id. Report status (queued, sent, delivered, bounced, complained). Cache in STREAM.resend_email_{id} (30s TTL).
For send history: execute Resend_ListEmails. Present chronologically with to, subject, status, and created_at. Cache in STREAM.resend_list (60s TTL).
For domain management: execute Resend_ListDomains then Resend_GetDomain for details. Present verification status and required DNS records. Cache in LTM.
For API key audit: execute Resend_ListApiKeys. Present key names and creation dates (never expose key values). Cache in STREAM (5min TTL).
Compile results. For sent emails, provide email_id for future tracking. For domain issues, provide specific DNS record instructions.
Log operation in LTM with key 'resend_op_{timestamp}' including intent, email_id if applicable, and daily send count.
